_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Implement missing evidence-ingestion pipeline (CR-00020 follow-up) and backfill archived items

steps.description: Create orch/evidences.py:ingest_phase_from_disk, add IW_CORE_EVIDENCE_MAX_BYTES, hook into iw approve (pre) and iw step-done (post for browser_verification), update docs
Review S01: transaction scope, size-limit semantics, upsert correctness, no agent-facing surface change
Unit tests for ingest helper + integration tests for iw approve/step-done ingestion + post-archive regression test (the gap CR-00020 S15 missed)
Review S03: AC coverage, no DB mocking in integration tests, regression test exercises archiver cleanup
Cross-layer review: AC1–AC8 coverage, transactional correctness, archive-survival behaviour, docs synced
QV: Browser verification — verify the new ingestion path end-to-end in the isolated worktree stack (approve → pre ingested; browser-step-done → post ingested; archive cleanup → tab still populated)
Write scripts/CR-00025_backfill_evidences.py, run against the production orch DB, screenshot I-00044 Evidences tab as post evidence, then DELETE the script before completing
